name: API Service
description: Standard API service project with schema, endpoints, auth, tests, and docs

phases.name: Foundation
phases.description: Project setup, database schema, and core configuration

plans.name: Project Scaffolding
plans.description: Initialize project structure, dependencies, and configuration files

plans.name: Database Schema
plans.description: Design and implement database models and migrations

plans.name: Configuration Management
plans.description: Environment variables, settings, and config validation

phases.name: Core API
phases.description: Implement primary API endpoints and business logic

plans.name: CRUD Endpoints
plans.description: Implement core create, read, update, delete endpoints

plans.name: Business Logic
plans.description: Implement domain-specific business rules and validation

plans.name: Error Handling
plans.description: Standardized error responses, validation errors, and error middleware

phases.name: Authentication & Authorization
phases.description: Implement auth system and access control

plans.name: Auth System
plans.description: Implement authentication (JWT/session) with login, logout, refresh

plans.name: Authorization
plans.description: Role-based access control and permission checks on endpoints

plans.name: Integration Tests
plans.description: End-to-end API tests covering all endpoints and edge cases

plans.name: API Documentation
plans.description: OpenAPI/Swagger docs, usage examples, and deployment guide
